requirement_topic.en: EMC — CNI Standards Compliance (Radio Emissions / Interference)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——CNI标准合规（无线电辐射/干扰）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——CNI標準合規（無線電輻射/干擾）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements for wireless and IoT devices in Côte d'Ivoire are referenced through CNI (Comité National de Normalisation des TIC), the national ICT standards body. CNI aligns with international standards (IEC/CISPR/ETSI) for emissions and immunity. EMC test reports must be submitted as part of the ARTCI homologation technical dossier. Documentation must be in French. ARTCI enforces a 5 GHz indoor-use restriction: devices operating on 5 GHz must not be used or labelled for outdoor deployment without specific ARTCI authorisation.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦无线及物联网设备的电磁兼容（EMC）要求通过国家信息通信技术标准化委员会（CNI）参考执行，CNI是国家信息通信技术标准机构。CNI与国际标准（IEC/CISPR/ETSI）接轨，涵盖辐射及抗扰度要求。EMC测试报告须作为ARTCI准入认证技术文件的一部分提交，文件须以法语撰写。ARTCI执行5 GHz室内使用限制：在5 GHz频段运行的设备未经ARTCI专项授权，不得用于或标注为室外部署。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦無線及物聯網裝置的電磁相容（EMC）要求通過國家資訊通訊技術標準化委員會（CNI）參考執行，CNI是國家資訊通訊技術標準機構。CNI與國際標準（IEC/CISPR/ETSI）接軌，涵蓋輻射及抗擾度要求。EMC測試報告須作為ARTCI準入認證技術文件的一部分提交，文件須以法語撰寫。ARTCI執行5 GHz室內使用限制：在5 GHz頻段運行的裝置未經ARTCI專項授權，不得用於或標注為室外部署。

standards_or_laws: CNI (Comité National de Normalisation des TIC) — Côte d'Ivoire national ICT standards body
ETSI EN 301 893 / EN 300 328 equivalent (5 GHz / 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi, referenced by CNI)
ARTCI 5 GHz indoor restriction (ARTCI spectrum management)

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices undergo SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval testing per CMIIT requirements and GB/T EMC standards (e.g. GB/T 9254 for ITE emissions, aligned with CISPR 22/32). EMC test reports to GB/T standards are generated by China-accredited labs. These reports are not directly accepted by ARTCI; new test reports to CNI/IEC/ETSI-referenced standards from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited lab are required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备按CMIIT要求和GB/T EMC标准（如GB/T 9254，与CISPR 22/32对应）进行SRRC无线电型式核准测试。EMC测试报告由中国认可实验室按GB/T标准出具。这些报告不被ARTCI直接接受；须由ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室按CNI/IEC/ETSI参考标准出具新的测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國無線裝置按CMIIT要求和GB/T EMC標準（如GB/T 9254，與CISPR 22/32對應）進行SRRC無線電型式核准測試。EMC測試報告由中國認可實驗室按GB/T標準出具。這些報告不被ARTCI直接接受；須由ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室按CNI/IEC/ETSI參考標準出具新的測試報告。

gap.en: Full gap for test reports: Chinese GB/T EMC lab reports are not accepted by ARTCI. New EMC test reports to CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI-referenced standards from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited lab, submitted in French, are required as part of the ARTCI homologation dossier. Additionally, 5 GHz devices must be tested and labelled for indoor use only unless ARTCI outdoor authorisation is obtained.
gap.zh: 测试报告完全差距：中国GB/T EMC实验室报告不被ARTCI接受。须由ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室按CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI参考标准出具新的EMC测试报告，以法语提交，作为ARTCI准入认证文件的一部分。此外，5 GHz设备须经测试并标注为仅限室内使用，除非获得ARTCI室外授权。
gap.zht: 測試報告完全差距：中國GB/T EMC實驗室報告不被ARTCI接受。須由ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室按CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI參考標準出具新的EMC測試報告，以法語提交，作為ARTCI準入認證文件的一部分。此外，5 GHz裝置須經測試並標注為僅限室內使用，除非獲得ARTCI室外授權。

source.publisher: ARTCI — Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T EMC test reports are not accepted for ARTCI homologation. EMC test reports to CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI-referenced standards from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory, submitted in French, are required. Devices with 5 GHz Wi-Fi must be tested and labelled for indoor use only per ARTCI spectrum restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T EMC测试报告不被ARTCI准入认证接受。须由ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室按CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI参考标准出具EMC测试报告，以法语提交。含5 GHz Wi-Fi的设备须按ARTCI频谱限制经测试并标注为仅限室内使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T EMC測試報告不被ARTCI準入認證接受。須由ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室按CNI/IEC/CISPR/ETSI參考標準出具EMC測試報告，以法語提交。含5 GHz Wi-Fi的裝置須按ARTCI頻譜限制經測試並標注為僅限室內使用。

requirement_topic.en: ECOWAS / UEMOA Harmonised Framework — Regional MRA Outlook
requirement_topic.zh: 西非国家经济共同体/西非经货联盟协调框架——地区互认前景
requirement_topic.zht: 西非國家經濟共同體/西非經貨聯盟協調框架——地區互認前景

summary.en: Côte d'Ivoire is a member of ECOWAS (Economic Community of West African States / CEDEAO) and UEMOA (West African Economic and Monetary Union). ECOWAS is developing a harmonised type approval framework for telecommunications equipment that could create a West African MRA (mutual recognition agreement), reducing the need for country-by-country homologation. The UEMOA framework provides trade facilitation provisions relevant to equipment imports. As of 2026, ARTCI national homologation remains mandatory; exporters should monitor ECOWAS progress for potential future simplification.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦是西非国家经济共同体（ECOWAS/CEDEAO）和西非经济货币联盟（UEMOA）的成员国。ECOWAS正在开发电信设备统一型式认可框架，有望建立西非相互承认协议（MRA），减少逐国准入认证的需求。UEMOA框架为设备进口提供贸易便利化规定。截至2026年，ARTCI国家准入认证仍为强制要求；出口商应关注ECOWAS进展以了解潜在的未来简化。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦是西非國家經濟共同體（ECOWAS/CEDEAO）和西非經濟貨幣聯盟（UEMOA）的成員國。ECOWAS正在開發電信設備統一型式認可框架，有望建立西非相互承認協議（MRA），減少逐國準入認證的需求。UEMOA框架為設備進口提供貿易便利化規定。截至2026年，ARTCI國家準入認證仍為強制要求；出口商應關注ECOWAS進展以了解潛在的未來簡化。

standards_or_laws: ECOWAS (CEDEAO) Harmonised Framework for Telecommunications Type Approval (developing)

summary.en: China participates in ILAC and IAF mutual recognition arrangements for conformity assessment. Chinese-accredited lab reports under ILAC/MRA may be acceptable to ARTCI as supporting technical evidence within the homologation dossier, but this does not replace the ARTCI homologation decision itself. China has no equivalent regional MRA framework comparable to ECOWAS.
summary.zh: 中国参与ILAC和IAF合格评定相互承认安排。中国认可实验室出具的符合ILAC/MRA要求的报告可作为准入认证文件中的辅助技术证据被ARTCI接受，但不能取代ARTCI的准入认证决定本身。中国无类似ECOWAS的对应地区MRA框架。
summary.zht: 中國參與ILAC和IAF合格評定相互承認安排。中國認可實驗室出具的符合ILAC/MRA要求的報告可作為準入認證文件中的輔助技術證據被ARTCI接受，但不能取代ARTCI的準入認證決定本身。中國無類似ECOWAS的對應地區MRA框架。

gap.en: Monitoring gap: ECOWAS harmonisation could simplify multi-market West Africa entry in future, but as of 2026 each ECOWAS member state including Côte d'Ivoire requires its own national type approval. ILAC/MRA-accredited lab reports may be submitted to ARTCI as technical evidence but the ARTCI homologation decision remains a separate national requirement. Chinese exporters should monitor ECOWAS MRA developments.
gap.zh: 监控差距：ECOWAS协调工作未来可能简化西非多国市场准入，但截至2026年，科特迪瓦等各ECOWAS成员国仍须单独取得国家型式认可。ILAC/MRA认可实验室报告可作为技术证据提交给ARTCI，但ARTCI准入认证决定仍是独立的国家要求。中国出口商应持续关注ECOWAS MRA进展。
gap.zht: 監控差距：ECOWAS協調工作未來可能簡化西非多國市場准入，但截至2026年，科特迪瓦等各ECOWAS成員國仍須單獨取得國家型式認可。ILAC/MRA認可實驗室報告可作為技術證據提交給ARTCI，但ARTCI準入認證決定仍是獨立的國家要求。中國出口商應持續關注ECOWAS MRA進展。

source.publisher: ECOWAS — Economic Community of West African States

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ECOWAS harmonised type approval is developing but does not yet replace ARTCI national homologation. Côte d'Ivoire requires its own ARTCI homologation certificate. ILAC/MRA-accredited lab reports may support the ARTCI dossier but do not constitute approval. Monitor ECOWAS MRA progress for potential future simplification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ECOWAS统一型式认可框架正在推进，但尚未取代ARTCI国家准入认证。科特迪瓦仍要求独立的ARTCI准入认证证书。ILAC/MRA认可实验室报告可作为ARTCI文件的辅助证据，但不构成批准。应持续关注ECOWAS MRA进展以了解潜在的未来简化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ECOWAS統一型式認可框架正在推進，但尚未取代ARTCI國家準入認證。科特迪瓦仍要求獨立的ARTCI準入認證證書。ILAC/MRA認可實驗室報告可作為ARTCI文件的輔助證據，但不構成批准。應持續關注ECOWAS MRA進展以了解潛在的未來簡化。
